parents.subject: LU-18249 o2iblnd: external mofed driver requires

commit.subject: LU-18224 o2ib: normalize in-kernel-ko2iblnd.ko name (dup)
commit.message:
LU-18224 o2ib: normalize in-kernel-ko2iblnd.ko name (dup)

in-kernel-ko2iblnd module should be named as ko2iblnd.

(placeholder to not disturb existing patch)

Test-Parameters: for-build-only
Fixes: 8b1d2a72f1 ("LU-16967 build: Add in-kernel-ko2iblnd driver")
HPE-bug-id: LUS-12525
Signed-off-by: Shaun Tancheff <shaun.tancheff@hpe.com>
